note: INV-006: committed wall-clock bound for a FULL two-route run including provisioning, restore, build, shared probes, and aggregation (codex F12). One absolute deadline on a true monotonic source, held by the bootstrap controller from run mint through final aggregation.

supervision.outer_watchdog: parent of the controller — not a test executed by it (RS-015)

exit_code_contract.other: infrastructure failure — never read as pass or refutation (AP-003/AP-009)
